name: Mom's Stir Fry Sweet and Sour Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 Bell pepper, with the center removed
1/2 tsp Cornstarch dissolved in 1/4 cup Vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, cook the pork and garlic in hot oil over medium heat for 3-4 minutes.
2. Add MSG, sugar, fish sauce, and onions. Stir 5-6 times.
3. Add the remaining ingredients except for the cornstarch mixture. Continue cooking for 3-4 more minutes.
4. Pour in the cornstarch mixture. Stir well until all meat and vegetables are coated with a light, clear starch coating.
5. Remove from heat and serve hot over rice.
My mother is visiting from Thailand. She prepared this dish tonight. Enjoy!
